_comment: UX-army camera-feed library. Each scene is a POOL of clips in dev/feeds/<scene>/ (gitignored; testing/harness/fetch_feeds.sh downloads and YOLO-gates them). start_stack.sh publishes one variant per scene at rtsp://localhost:8554/<scene> and rotates variants by runs_completed, so a persistent camera sees different footage on different runs. Personas pick the scene matching their story; two personas may share a scene but should name/frame their cameras differently.

front-door.scene: people approaching one at a time, entryway framing

street.scene: street with pedestrians, a cyclist and cars passing

shop-aisle.scene: retail interior: store aisle with shoppers, produce counter

indoor-room.scene: indoor room with people moving, plus close-range face material

yard.scene: outdoor work zone, person moving through a yard-like area

lobby.scene: fixed CCTV entrance hall (CAVIAR): walking, browsing, meetings, bag drops, fights. Incident-flavored variants are deliberate material for alert/review flows.

sidewalk.scene: pedestrians walking toward camera, faces visible (face-recognition material)

guardian-room.scene: indoor room, single occupant: UR Fall clips END WITH A PERSON ON THE FLOOR (fall detection positives), urfall-adl-* are normal daily activities (negatives), caviar-rest-* are slumping/lying variants. Core elder-care test material.

uxcam.scene: legacy looping CCTV street clip (dev/sample-cctv.mp4), kept for continuity with pre-library cameras
